Document:
# Core Rule 9 - Do not share or switch accounts [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule.
Do not share your account with other users. [color=SlateGray](You are responsible for actions taken on your account.)[/color]
Do not use other accounts to connect to Wizard's Den servers.
# Switching usernames and accounts You may change your username at https://account.spacestation14.com/Identity/Account/Manage
As soon as you create or log into a new account, you must notify admins of your previous username at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/general/help/46
